title: wedelia caleoides
intro: Wedelia caleoides, also known as the goat's head or creeping zinnia, is a perennial flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Wedelia caleoides include treating skin conditions, wounds, and fever, as well as its use as an antihelmintic to expel intestinal parasites. Herbal preparations of Wedelia caleoides include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
